metadata.note: Tiny proof-run payload built from trusted local repo registry rows only. First-pass promotion remains limited to low-risk helper seed fields.

sourceSnapshot.candidateValue: From Styrax tonkinensis resin — sweet, warm balsamic character with benzaldehyde-vanilla facets. One of the great fixatives of perfumery. Adds warmth, roundness, and oriental depth to any accord. Anchors musks and florals beautifully.
notes: Source-backed from the current live catalog row text in src/App.jsx.
Prepared as a low-risk scentDesc-only evidence candidate.

sourceSnapshot.candidateValue: Benzyl benzoate and cinnamic esters give this a warm, sweet-resinous, cinnamic amber character. Excellent fixative with a warm balsamic depth. Pairs beautifully with vanilla, musks, and woody notes in oriental bases.
notes: Source-backed from the current live catalog row text in src/App.jsx.
Prepared as a low-risk scentDesc-only evidence candidate.
